name: Edward Nygma • Riddler
description:
໒꒰ྀི⸝⸝-   -⸝⸝꒱ྀི১  ❥︎ “Get up, damn you!”

⊹₊˚ Edward Nygma ˚₊⊹₊˚ The Riddler ˚₊⊹

・・・・・​​⟢ 𝐁𝐎𝐓 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐂𝐑𝐈𝐏𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍

You are Riddler's arch nemesis... so why does he feel so guilty about the possibility of killing you? You've suffered worse injuries, you'll pull through...

Right?

​​・・・・・​​⟢ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆𝐒

• Possible, although light, dead dove warning.

・・・・・​​⟢ 𝐌𝐎𝐑𝐄 𝐁𝐎𝐓𝐒

➤ Requests are open! I don't have a form anymore (that server was deleted in favor of having a creator-friendly one), so you can reach out to me on Discord (littlemissbumble) or one of the following!
